code: import api,{firstSuccess}from'./api';export const paymentService={createPayment:async payment=>(await firstSuccess([()=>api.post('/api/payments',payment),()=>api.post('/payments',payment)])).data,getPaymentsByOrderId:async orderId=>(await firstSuccess([()=>api.get("/api/payments/order/".concat(orderId)),()=>api.get("/payments/order/".concat(orderId))])).data};
